problem_statement: The 'max price' filter in the flight search service is incorrectly implemented, returning flights that exceed the specified maximum price instead of those that are at or below it.
goal: Correct the implementation of the 'max price' filter to return only flights priced at or below the specified max price.
acceptance_criteria: The flight search results correctly include only flights priced at or below the specified max price.
Unit tests are added to ensure the max price filter functions as expected.
repo_summary: README.md(1), backend(134), docker-compose.yml(1), frontend(8), run_backend.sh(1), run_frontend.sh(1), run_local.sh(1), scripts(7)
localization_rationale: The issue directly pertains to the functionality of the flight service responsible for searching flights based on price.
The function search_flights likely contains the logic for filtering flight results based on price criteria.
